rationale: No conflict. Gov't Code §2306.173 governs departmental investment authority and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote:
Subject to a resolution authorizing issuance of its bonds, the department may:
(1) invest its money in bonds, obligations, or other securities; or
(2) place its money in demand or time deposits, whether or not evidenced by certificates of deposit.
_note: Rule text concerns department investment authority; no bearing on homestead exemption valuation.
